description_long: This is a large, commercial-grade espresso coffee machine with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in black and silver. The front features three prominent portafilters, a digital control panel with multiple buttons and displays, and two steam wands on either side. The top surface is flat and likely serves as a cup-warming tray, bordered by a raised rail. The side panels are angular and robust, contributing to the machine's sturdy appearance. The back is smooth and features a visible brand logo, while the overall build suggests a heavy-duty appliance suitable for high-traffic urban environments like cafes or coffee shops. The materials appear to be mostly metal and plastic, with some glass or acrylic elements on the control panel.
description: A large, commercial espresso coffee machine with a black and silver finish, digital controls, three portafilters, and dual steam wands. Its robust, angular design is suited for professional urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three portafilters, a digital control panel with buttons and displays, and two steam wands on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular side panel and protruding portafilter handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth back panel with a visible brand logo and no interactive components.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angular design and portafilter handles.
attribute_brand_logo: A logo reading 'SABERANO' is visible on the rear panel, positioned towards the right side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front, featuring a central touchscreen display flanked by physical buttons and labeled icons on both sides.
